counter_factor_help: Value per counter step in m³. Comma or dot is allowed, e.g. 0.01.
counter_debounce_help: Only relevant for boolean pulses. Suppresses repeated counts caused by bouncing.
counter_hint: In counter mode, the type is detected automatically or can be selected manually. Numeric counters are interpreted as absolute counter values, boolean values as pulses. Corrections can later be made directly via the data point Consumption > Meter reading.
calorific_value_help: Comma or dot is allowed, e.g. 11.563.
state_number_help: Comma or dot is allowed, e.g. 0.9468.
tariff_hint: At least one active tariff is required. The current and previous tariff form the current and previous billing year. Start meter readings must be maintained carefully.
auto_manage_tariffs_help: Automatically creates follow-up tariffs or sets the current meter reading as the start value on the day of the tariff change.
